string.text: 7-round Very Normal .50 BMG Desert Eagle Magazine
7-round magazine that could be chambered for .50 BMG rounds, and could be prepared for a Desert Eagle that could or could not be chambered for such caliber, but actually fits in a M82 as well!
20-round Absolutely Normal .50 BMG Desert Eagle Drum

20-round drum magazine that could be chambered for .50 BMG rounds, and could be prepared for a Desert Eagle that could or could not be chambered for such caliber, but don't let your eyes deceive you, because such things aren't possi- yeah, ok, fine, it's all that, and yes you can load it on a M82, ask the maniac who made it why, please stop aiming at my head!
